hero.title: Our Services

collision.title: Collision Repair
collision.description: Comprehensive collision repair services using the latest technology and OEM parts. We restore your vehicle to factory specifications with precision and care.

paint.title: Paint Services
paint.description: Expert color matching and professional paint application. Our state-of-the-art paint booth ensures a perfect, long-lasting finish every time.

dent.title: Dent Removal
dent.description: Paintless dent repair and traditional dent removal services. We can fix minor dings to major dents while preserving your original paint.

frame.title: Frame Straightening
frame.description: Advanced frame straightening and alignment using computerized measuring systems. We ensure your vehicle's structural integrity is fully restored.

glass.title: Glass Replacement
glass.description: Professional windshield and auto glass replacement services. We use only high-quality glass and ensure proper installation for your safety.

insurance.title: Insurance Claims Assistance
insurance.description: We work directly with all major insurance companies to make your claim process smooth and hassle-free. Let us handle the paperwork.

visit.hoursText:
Mon - Fri: 8:30 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 8:30 AM - 2:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

q1.question: Do you work with all insurance companies?
q1.answer: Yes! We work with all major insurance companies and can help you navigate the claims process from start to finish.

q2.question: How long will my repair take?
q2.answer: Repair time varies depending on the extent of damage. Minor repairs may take 2-3 days, while major collision repairs can take 1-2 weeks. We'll provide you with an accurate timeline during your estimate.

q3.question: Do you offer free estimates?
q3.answer: Absolutely! We provide free, no-obligation estimates for all collision repair work. Contact us or stop by our shop to get your free estimate.

q4.question: Will my warranty be affected?
q4.answer: No. We use OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) parts and follow manufacturer specifications, so your vehicle warranty remains intact.

q5.question: Do you provide rental cars?
q5.answer: We can help arrange rental car services through your insurance company. Many insurance policies include rental car coverage during repairs.

q6.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q6.answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, checks, and insurance payments. We'll work directly with your insurance company for seamless payment processing.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner in collision repair for over 25 years

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 1998, Mavi Collision Center has been serving our community with exceptional auto body repair services for over two decades. What started as a small family-owned shop has grown into one of the region's most trusted collision repair facilities.
story.p2: Our commitment to quality workmanship, honest service, and customer satisfaction has remained unchanged since day one. We treat every vehicle as if it were our own, ensuring that each repair meets or exceeds manufacturer specifications.
story.p3: With state-of-the-art equipment, certified technicians, and a passion for excellence, we're proud to be your first choice for collision repair services.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We never compromise on quality. Every repair meets the highest industry standards.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Transparent pricing and honest communication throughout the entire repair process.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: Fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality to get you back on the road quickly.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear explanations and detailed estimates so you know exactly what to expect.
